description_long: This is a classic assault rifle with a wooden fixed stock, wooden handguard, and pistol grip, paired with a black metal receiver and barrel. The rifle features a curved detachable box magazine, typical of the AK-47 family, and standard iron sights mounted on the top. The barrel is long and slender, ending in a simple flash hider. The overall design is robust, with visible screws and mechanical details on the receiver and magazine release. The wood components have a reddish-brown finish, contrasting with the matte black metal parts. This rifle is commonly seen in military, paramilitary, and urban conflict scenarios.
description: A robust assault rifle with a wooden stock and handguard, black metal receiver, and curved magazine, featuring iron sights and a flash hider.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the muzzle end, showing the narrow profile of the barrel and front sight.
description_view_1: The left side view displays the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, handguard, curved magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_2: The rifle is viewed from the buttstock end, emphasizing the slim profile and alignment of the barrel and stock.
description_view_3: The right side view reveals the receiver details, magazine, trigger, and the wooden furniture, similar to the left side but with more detail on the ejection port.
